pass1_value.note: Official docs show OAuth 2.0 for apps (Authorization: Bearer <token>) and the API examples and Developer Center show use of personal API tokens in the Authorization header (treated as API token/api_key).

final_value.note: Official monday.com API docs state you authenticate by providing an authorization token in the Authorization header, supporting both Personal API tokens (Authorization: <your_api_token>) and OAuth 2.0 access tokens (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>).
